title: arenaria serpyllifolia var. minutiflora
intro: Arenaria serpyllifolia var. minutiflora, also known as dwarf sandwort, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Arenaria serpyllifolia var. minutiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Arenaria serpyllifolia var. minutiflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
